title: ⏱ Polyfractal Time Gods
name: ⏱ Polyfractal Time Gods
what_it_is: Deities made of overlapping fractal time branches—each limb a different era, every gesture a temporal recursion across multiple histories.
how_to_use: his arm is made of centuries—each finger a looping timeline fractal
she weaves polyfractal threads—past and future stitched into divine anatomy
animation_behavior: Limbs shift through centuries, movement triggers historical overlap, body morphs with temporal recursion ---
